title: I built a no-code EA builder for MetaTrader — looking for honest feedback from system traders
author: Cold-Pin-345
selftext:
Hi everyone,

Over the past months I’ve been working on a tool that allows traders to build Expert Advisors for MT4/MT5 without writing MQL code.

The idea came from a frustration I kept seeing:

A lot of traders have structured ideas, but:

* They don’t know MQL
* Outsourcing is expensive
* Or they get stuck debugging instead of testing logic

So I built a rule-based EA builder where you define:

• Entry conditions  
• Exit rules  
• Risk management  
• Backtest  
• Export

All visually.

It’s not meant to replace coding for advanced developers.  
It’s meant to remove friction for traders who think in systems but don’t want to deal with syntax.

I’m not here to pitch — I’m genuinely looking for feedback from serious system traders:

* What would you expect from a tool like this?
* Where do most no-code builders fail?
* What would make it actually useful for you?

If anyone is open to testing or giving blunt feedback, I’d really appreciate it.

Trying to build something that’s actually valuable in this space.

comments.author: futtychrone-
comments.body:
Sound approach. I would say focus on what you want first instead of seeking validation. Built what you want to overcome your own frustrations first. If you think of a magic bot that wins Then that be a fantasy. Instead of try to find solutions where you are failing or may fail first. Mitigate them then test your idea. 

Then you can ask confidently to validate what you built if you want. Otherwise your system thinking will be thrown to rift with conflicting ideas. 
All the best. Looking forward to your results how you overcome them.

replies.author: Cold-Pin-345
replies.body: As I said in my post, I already built a tool. It is ready to use, but I'm looking for traders who wants to test it..

replies.author: futtychrone-
replies.body: Well I may have got the context wrong. That being said Let it trade on paper, built sample data test. Then publish that way people don’t feel like they are trying something not worth their time. I’m not dashing you. But seen results would make me wants to try it too.

replies.author: Cold-Pin-345
replies.body: Thanks for your explanation! I understand what you said, but an EA builder is not just an EA. It is a platform/tool where traders can create an EA, within minutes, than backtest it in MT5. I was just looking for traders who can use this platform, and share some feedback

replies.author: futtychrone-
replies.body:
Ok. So what you have built is something I can think this setup may work, let me check that, but wait I don’t know how to code. 
But your tool will let me, explain my idea in plain language, and your tool will create an ea to reflect what you have asked ?

If that’s so that’s sound more like another post I read on Reddit where the guy was using finstock a llm based chat doing exactly that. 

Nevertheless good luck. Look in to that you may find more information to your questions. Also post some screenshots showing how it parse the language and how good it put that into actual ea. 

That way surely you will get people want to test it. 
Because not all here are traders 90% of them are dreamers, With actual limitations. 
your approach  may help someone to learn more before how to trade before getting burned. Well done. 
And all the best.

replies.author: Cold-Pin-345
replies.body: It's called AlgoStudio, you can check it on [algo-studio.com](http://algo-studio.com)
